content:
- Completed task postgres-auth-role-matrix-validation-and-e2e end-to-end.
- Final gates passed: make check, make test, make test-long, make lint.
- Ran task switch, committed all changes in 7b37e0b, pushed master, and the post-commit docs publish hook also completed successfully.

- Read `.ralph/current_tasks.md` and `.ralph/current_tasks_done.md` to identify active candidates.
- Confirmed the only failing active task is `.ralph/tasks/bugs/postgres-primary-conninfo-password-auth-missing.md`; it has no `<blocked_by>` tags, so it is unblocked and must be chosen before the recurring meta-task.
- Wrote `.ralph/tasks/bugs/postgres-primary-conninfo-password-auth-missing.md` to `.ralph/current_task.txt`.

- Started new turn by reading previous progress and .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Current task path is .ralph/tasks/bugs/postgres-primary-conninfo-password-auth-missing.md.
- Reading the task file now to determine whether I need to plan, verify, or execute.

- Read the task file; it is in the initial planning phase with no TO BE VERIFIED / NOW EXECUTE marker yet.
- Inspecting replication config code and HA tests to build a detailed execution plan only.
- Need to stop after writing the plan and adding TO BE VERIFIED.

- Confirmed the likely fix shape is a managed passfile / explicit standby credential artifact instead of embedding passwords in primary_conninfo.
- Checking the existing custom-role HA e2e scenario and process-dispatch managed-config tests so the task plan can name exact test deltas and execution order.
- Next step is to write the detailed plan into the task file and end it with TO BE VERIFIED, then stop.

- Finished the initial planning-only pass for postgres-primary-conninfo-password-auth-missing.
- Wrote a detailed execution plan into the task file, including the typed standby-auth/passfile approach, exact files to change, test coverage to add, and the required skeptical review targets.
- Set the task-file terminal marker to TO BE VERIFIED and stopped before implementation, per workflow. Next turn must do the skeptical review, alter at least one concrete plan item, and only then promote to NOW EXECUTE.

- Read previous progress and confirmed current task path is .ralph/tasks/bugs/postgres-primary-conninfo-password-auth-missing.md.
- Opening the task file now to see whether it is still in TO BE VERIFIED or already promoted to NOW EXECUTE.
- Next step is to perform the required skeptical review and change at least one plan item before any implementation.

- Performed the required TO BE VERIFIED skeptical review for postgres-primary-conninfo-password-auth-missing.
- Changed the plan before promotion: use a dedicated managed primary_conninfo render/parse helper instead of broadening generic PgConnInfo parsing, require managed passfile paths to stay under PGDATA, and strengthen the real startup proof to insert WAL after startup and verify replay on the replica.
- Replaced the task marker with NOW EXECUTE and stopped. Next turn should execute the written plan directly without more exploratory work.

- Read previous progress and confirmed current task path is .ralph/tasks/bugs/postgres-primary-conninfo-password-auth-missing.md.
- Opening the task document now; progress indicates it has already been promoted to NOW EXECUTE, so this turn should execute the written plan directly.
- Next step is to read the task plan, apply the planned code/docs/test changes, and run the full required make targets before task switch / commit / push.

- Opened the managed config, runtime startup, HA dispatch, conninfo, and process job code paths.
- Decided to implement a dedicated ManagedStandbyAuth surface with a managed primary_conninfo render/parse helper, keeping generic PgConnInfo unchanged.
- Next I am patching postgres_managed_conf.rs first, then postgres_managed.rs for passfile materialization and runtime/HA plumbing.

- Patched postgres_managed_conf.rs with ManagedStandbyAuth plus managed primary_conninfo render/parse support.
- Patched postgres_managed.rs to normalize standby auth paths, materialize/remove the managed passfile, and route existing managed replica state through the dedicated parser.
- Next I am wiring runtime/node and ha/process_dispatch to build replica intents from ReplicatorSourceConn auth instead of dropping auth.

- Finished the implementation for postgres-primary-conninfo-password-auth-missing: managed standby auth now carries a passfile-backed variant, managed configs materialize/clean the standby passfile, and startup/HA intent construction preserves replicator auth.
- Added focused render/parse/passfile tests, strengthened the real managed-start test to prove post-start WAL replay with password-auth replication, updated recovery docs, and ran all required gates successfully.
- Next I am marking the task complete in the task file, switching Ralph tasks, committing all tracked/untracked changes including .ralph evidence/state, and pushing.
